papers.title: Danus: Orchestrating Mathematical Reasoning Agents with Fact-Graph Memory
papers.abstract: Recent LLM-based mathematical reasoning agents have begun to tackle research-level problems and, in several cases, have contributed to the resolution of open problems. However, scaling and orchestrating such agents effectively remains challenging, due to the difficulty of coordinating parallel proof search while keeping intermediate claims organized and reliable. In this paper, we propose Danus, an orchestration system for research-level mathematical reasoning centered on a shared fact graph as a global memory-management mechanism. Danus consists of a main agent that performs planning and coordination, multiple worker agents that carry out proof search in parallel, and a stateless verifier that checks proposed mathematical claims before they are admitted into the fact graph. Each verified fact is stored together with its proof and logical dependencies, allowing the system to build long arguments incrementally while keeping the shared proof state organized. The main agent periodically summarizes the evolving proof state, redirects workers across promising directions, and supports interaction with human mathematicians through progress reports. We evaluate Danus through six research-level case studies in algebraic geometry, singularity theory, and combinatorics, illustrating how the fact-graph memory mechanism enables Danus to construct long, detailed mathematical proofs. Our results suggest that fact-graph-based orchestration provides an effective route toward scaling mathematical reasoning agents for long-horizon research problems. Danus is open source at this https URL .

papers.title_zh: Danus：用事实图记忆编排数学推理智能体
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 Danus，一个面向研究级数学问题的智能体编排系统，其核心是用共享事实图管理全局记忆。系统由负责规划协调的主智能体、并行执行证明搜索的多个工作智能体，以及对候选数学结论进行检查的无状态验证器组成。作者通过多个研究级案例说明，事实图能够把已验证结论、证明和逻辑依赖组织起来，从而支持长程、可累积的数学证明构建。
innovations: 提出以共享事实图为核心的全局记忆机制，用于组织研究级数学推理中的中间结论与依赖关系。
设计主智能体、并行工作智能体和无状态验证器协同的编排架构，兼顾并行探索与结论可靠性。
将每条已验证事实与其证明和逻辑依赖共同存储，支持长链条证明的逐步累积。
支持对 evolving proof state 的周期性总结与人机协作汇报，增强研究过程可管理性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究级数学推理、长程证明搜索和需要多智能体并行探索的形式化或半形式化研究场景。论文主要解决并行证明搜索中中间结论难以管理、共享记忆混乱以及可靠性不足的问题。
papers.title_en: Danus: Orchestrating Mathematical Reasoning Agents with Fact-Graph Memory

papers.title: Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation for Edge-Efficient Pathology Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Computational pathology foundation models (PFMs) have advanced whole-slide image analysis. However, their size and inference cost hinder local deployment in pathology departments. We propose MuCoDi, a pretraining framework that distills frozen tile embeddings from multiple PFMs into compact edge-oriented encoders. Instead of regressing individual teacher features, MuCoDi trains lightweight MobileOne and RepViT students with a contrastive distillation objective adapted from MoCo v3, where cached Virchow2, UNI2, and H-Optimus-1 embeddings replace momentum-encoder keys. We pretrain students on 14.3M TCGA tiles from only 11.8K WSIs and evaluate frozen encoders on 23 clinically curated downstream classification tasks. RepViT-based MuCoEdge students retain near-teacher performance while reducing model size by orders of magnitude: MuCoEdge-R2.3 and MuCoEdge-R1.5 reach 71.0% external AUROC, within 0.8 percentage points of the best teacher (Virchow2, 71.8%), while MuCoEdge-R2.3 obtains the best external F1 and the second-best AUPRC (51.8% and 53.3%). MuCoEdge-R1.0 reaches 70.9% AUROC with only 6.4M parameters and 1.12 GFLOPs. On a Raspberry Pi 5, sub-million-parameter MobileOne students achieve up to 605-fold single-tile speedup over Virchow2 while retaining 66.5% to 66.9% external AUROC, demonstrating that PFM-quality pathology representations can be moved toward practical edge deployment. Code is available at this https URL .

papers.title_zh: 面向边缘高效病理基础模型的多教师对比蒸馏
papers.summary_cn: 该论文面向计算病理基础模型难以在本地或边缘设备部署的问题，提出 MuCoDi 预训练框架，将多个大型病理基础模型的切片嵌入蒸馏到轻量学生编码器中。方法不是直接回归教师特征，而是采用适配自 MoCo v3 的对比式蒸馏目标，让轻量模型学习多教师提供的表征。结果显示，紧凑学生模型在显著降低体积与推理成本的同时，仍能保持接近教师模型的下游性能。
innovations: 提出多教师对比蒸馏框架 MuCoDi，将多个冻结病理基础模型的嵌入联合蒸馏到边缘导向学生编码器。
用对比蒸馏替代逐特征回归，通过缓存教师嵌入构造学习信号，更适合轻量学生表征学习。
将病理基础模型表征迁移到 MobileOne、RepViT 等轻量架构，面向本地和边缘部署优化性能与效率平衡。
papers.scenario_cn: 用于数字病理全切片图像分析的轻量化部署，适合医院本地设备、边缘终端或资源受限环境下的病理表征提取与下游分类任务。
papers.title_en: Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation for Edge-Efficient Pathology Foundation Models

papers.title: Point as Skeleton: Accumulated Point Cloud Enhanced Autoregressive Generation for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation
papers.abstract: Evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) remains challenging, as existing driving simulation methods often trade off closed-loop interactivity (e.g., CARLA) and real-world visual fidelity (e.g., nuScenes). We present \textbf{\emph{Point as Skeleton}}, a generative sensor simulation framework for state-updated autoregressive driving video generation, in which an autoregressive generator synthesizes visual observations from step-wise updated ego states, actor states, scene maps, and point-cloud skeleton conditions. To support closed-loop rollout, we introduce Reset-and-Roll, which adapts rolling diffusion inference to simulation by preventing future-conditioned latent states from being committed across simulation steps. To stabilize error accumulation during step-wise autoregressive rollout, we introduce point-cloud skeletons that decouple foreground and background assets and project them into camera-view painted-point and template-depth conditions, providing appearance and geometric cues. We further implement a nuPlan-based renderer-level closed-loop generative interface for evaluating generation under ego deviations from the original log. Experiments on nuScenes and nuPlan show that \textit{Point as Skeleton} improves autoregressive generation quality during closed-loop rollout, demonstrating its potential for visually faithful closed-loop driving simulation. The code is available at this https URL .

papers.title_zh: 点作为骨架：基于累积点云增强的闭环自动驾驶仿真自回归生成
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出了一个用于端到端自动驾驶评测的生成式传感器仿真框架，目标是在闭环交互性与真实视觉保真度之间取得更好的平衡。方法通过自回归生成器，结合逐步更新的自车状态、交通参与者状态、场景地图以及点云骨架条件，逐步合成驾驶视觉观测。为支持闭环仿真，作者还设计了适配滚动生成过程的机制，以减少跨步误差累积并提升连续生成稳定性。
innovations: 提出 Point as Skeleton 框架，将逐步更新的状态信息与点云骨架条件结合，用于闭环自动驾驶视频生成。
引入 Reset-and-Roll 机制，使滚动式生成过程适配仿真场景，避免未来条件潜变量在不同仿真步之间被错误继承。
使用点云骨架解耦前景与背景资产，并投影为相机视角下的 painted-point 与 template-depth 条件，同时提供外观与几何线索。
实现基于 nuPlan 的渲染器级闭环生成接口，用于评估车辆偏离原始日志轨迹时的生成表现。
papers.scenario_cn: 该工作主要解决自动驾驶仿真中“闭环可交互性”和“真实视觉生成”难以兼顾的问题，适用于端到端自动驾驶系统的仿真评测、闭环回放测试以及偏离原始驾驶轨迹后的感知场景生成。
papers.title_en: Point as Skeleton: Accumulated Point Cloud Enhanced Autoregressive Generation for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving Simulation

papers.title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
papers.abstract: Agentic video understanding equips models with long-term memory to autonomously process and respond to continuous, long-horizon multimodal streams. However, advanced video agents often rely on ``detective-style'' iterative reasoning for action control (e.g., $\mathtt{search}$) and evidence aggregation, incurring prohibitive costs and latency. We argue that such heavy reasoning primarily compensates for the lack of global context and semantic misalignment in retrieval. This paper introduces Light-Omni, a multimodal agent framework for reflexive and lightweight video understanding. It achieves this through dual contextual states that instantly build the required context in a single forward pass. First, we maintain a global state, a finite-sized multimodal script continuously consolidated from episodic memory, serving as the global context for Light-Omni. Through hierarchical merging, it preserves recent details while summarizing past events. Second, conditioned on this global context, we generate a parametric latent state that directly drives autonomous actions and produces retrieval embeddings, with minimal latency. Benefiting from this coupled design, Light-Omni achieves semantically aligned retrieval and reflexive responses while avoiding iterative reasoning. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of Light-Omni across multiple video benchmarks. Notably, it outperforms M3-Agent with an average 2.4% accuracy gain, a 12.1$\times$ speedup, and a 2.6$\times$ improvement in GPU memory efficiency. Furthermore, it serves as a memory system to enhance both the performance and efficiency of existing MLLMs. Project page: this https URL .

papers.title_zh: Light-Omni：在具身视频理解中以反射式响应替代重推理，并结合长期记忆
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 Light-Omni，一个面向长时程多模态视频流的轻量级智能体框架，目标是在持续视频理解中减少昂贵的迭代式推理与检索开销。方法通过维护全局多模态脚本状态，并在其条件下生成驱动动作与检索的潜在状态，从而在单次前向过程中快速构建上下文。作者认为，许多“侦探式”多轮推理本质上是在弥补全局上下文缺失和检索语义不对齐的问题，而其方法试图直接解决这一根因。
innovations: 提出双重上下文状态设计，将有限大小的全局多模态脚本状态与参数化潜在状态耦合，用于统一上下文建模、动作控制和检索。
采用分层合并方式持续整合情节记忆，在保留近期细节的同时压缩更早事件，支持长时程视频理解。
以反射式、轻量化响应替代传统依赖多轮搜索和证据聚合的迭代推理流程，降低时延与成本。
将语义对齐检索与自主动作生成放在同一框架中联合实现，并可作为外部记忆系统增强现有多模态大模型。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长视频、多模态连续流和需要长期记忆的智能体视频理解场景，解决传统方法在动作控制、检索和证据整合中依赖多轮推理导致的高时延、高成本问题。尤其适合希望在保证上下文连续性的同时提升响应速度和资源效率的视频智能体系统。
papers.title_en: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory

papers.title: CHARLIE: An On-Premise Multi-Agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation System for Evidential Reasoning in Forensic Science
papers.abstract: We present Charlie, an on-premise multi-agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for structured evidential processing in digital forensic environments. Contemporary forensic workflows must handle large volumes of heterogeneous and unstructured documents under strict requirements of traceability, confidentiality, and legal compliance. Charlie addresses this challenge through a controlled agent architecture that combines local retrieval, task decomposition, structured memory, and verification mechanisms. Unlike cloud-based systems, it operates entirely within institutional infrastructure, preserving data sovereignty and evidential integrity. We describe the systems architecture, including its transition from classical RAG to agent-based orchestration, and demonstrate its application in real-world forensic scenarios. Case studies show that Charlie enables scalable multi-document data extraction and supports longitudinal forensic intelligence generation while maintaining traceability and auditability. Our results indicate that agent-orchestrated, on-premise RAG architectures can effectively support evidential workflows without compromising legal and institutional constraints. Charlie provides a practical and reproducible blueprint for deploying AI systems in high-stakes forensic environments. This manuscript is an archival version of a paper presented at the RELAF 2026 Workshop.

papers.title_zh: CHARLIE：一个用于法庭科学证据推理的本地部署多智能体检索增强生成系统
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 Charlie，一个完全部署在机构本地基础设施内的多智能体 RAG 系统，用于数字取证环境中的结构化证据处理。系统结合本地检索、任务分解、结构化记忆和验证机制，以支持对大量异构、非结构化文档的可追踪分析。作者通过系统架构说明和真实取证案例展示其在不牺牲保密性、数据主权和法律合规性的前提下支持证据推理工作流。
innovations: 设计了面向数字取证场景的本地部署多智能体 RAG 架构，避免依赖云端系统。
将任务分解、结构化记忆和验证机制整合到证据处理流程中，强调可追溯性与审计性。
从经典 RAG 过渡到智能体编排体系，支持多文档抽取与长期取证情报生成。
给出了高风险法证环境中可复现的 AI 系统部署蓝图。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于数字取证、法庭科学和其他对保密性、证据完整性、审计追踪和法律合规要求很高的机构场景。主要解决海量异构证据文档难以安全、高效、可追踪处理的问题。
papers.title_en: CHARLIE: An On-Premise Multi-Agent Retrieval-Augmented Generation System for Evidential Reasoning in Forensic Science

papers.title: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Agent systems accumulate conflicting observations across branches, retries, and replicas, yet many practical memory layers still collapse disagreement behind overwrite rules that are difficult to inspect or correct. We present StateFuse, a conflict-aware replicated memory contract built on standard OpSet/CRDT merge. StateFuse does not introduce a new join algebra; it defines an agent-facing semantics layer with immutable history, explicit conflict objects, exact and semantic correction handles (claim_id / claim_ref), deterministic predicate contracts, and projection-time resolution that cannot rewrite replicated state. We evaluate StateFuse against flat multi-value, raw-log, provenance-style, and collapsed baselines under matched resolver and verification policies. On a 282-question official conflict-bearing MemoryAgentBench slice, the compared methods tie on answer accuracy, but conflict-preserving surfaces keep contradictions visible while collapsed surfaces do not. In a controlled agent loop with uniform verification, preserving ambiguity enables safer abstention and correction than early collapse. A correction-handle ablation further shows that semantic handles matter when exact prior identifiers are unavailable. The resulting claim is narrow: StateFuse is best supported as a safer public memory contract for contradiction surfacing, abstention, and auditable correction, not as a universal accuracy gain.

papers.title_zh: StateFuse：面向多智能体系统的确定性保留冲突记忆机制
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注多智能体系统中的共享记忆问题，尤其是不同分支、重试或副本之间出现相互冲突的观察记录时，传统覆盖式记忆层难以保留和审计分歧。作者提出 StateFuse，这是一种建立在标准 OpSet/CRDT 合并之上的冲突感知记忆语义层。它通过不可变历史、显式冲突对象和投影时消解等机制，让系统在不改写复制状态的前提下保留矛盾并支持后续纠错。
innovations: 提出面向智能体的冲突保留型记忆语义层，在标准 CRDT/OpSet 合并之上定义更适合多智能体使用的公共记忆契约。
引入显式冲突对象、不可变历史以及 claim_id/claim_ref 等精确与语义纠错句柄，增强可审计纠错能力。
采用投影时消解机制，使冲突处理不会直接重写底层复制状态，从而保留原始分歧信息。
通过与多种基线在冲突型记忆基准上的对比，强调其在矛盾显式呈现、安全弃答和纠错方面的价值。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于多智能体协作、长链路任务执行、存在重试和分支并行的智能体系统中，解决共享记忆里信息冲突被过早覆盖的问题。尤其适合需要保留矛盾、支持人工审计或后续纠错的 agent memory 基础设施场景。
papers.title_en: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems

papers.title: Think Before You Grid-Search: Floor-First Triage for LLM Serving
papers.abstract: LLM serving optimization typically benchmarks many configurations and reaches for heavy profilers when latency targets are missed. We argue for the reverse discipline: estimation is the analytical layer of profiling -- without it, optimization degenerates to grid search. Floor First is a residual-driven triage workflow. Each decode step is modeled as a five-dimensional resource vector (HBM bytes, FLOPs, network bytes, network messages, KV capacity); summing within a resource and maximizing across resources gives an optimistic floor, the plain sum a pessimistic one. Where a measurement lands inside this [max, sum] interval reads out overlap quality before any profiler is opened, and profilers escalate only on residuals above a stated threshold. Deployment alternatives are compared by wall ordering -- which resource wall binds first as load grows -- rather than by point benchmarks. The account is compositional: new attention or state-space variants enter by declaring one module, and the workflow ships as a zero-dependency calculator plus an agent skill that enforces the discipline in agentic optimization loops. As a case study we analyze a DeepSeek-V3.2-style 671B MoE/MLA model on 16 NVIDIA H20 GPUs, whose ridge point of ~74 FLOP/byte (vs ~590 for H100) makes it an extreme decode-oriented part. The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.4x. The layout judgment is thus a computable function of the operating point, explaining why production deployments on identical hardware have shipped opposite attention layouts.
papers.content_snippet: LLM serving optimization typically benchmarks many configurations and reaches for heavy profilers when latency targets are missed. We argue for the reverse discipline: estimation is the analytical layer of profiling -- without it, optimization degenerates to grid search. Floor First is a residual-driven triage workflow. Each decode step is modeled as a five-dimensional resource vector (HBM bytes, FLOPs, network bytes, network messages, KV capacity); summing within a resource and maximizing across resources gives an optimistic floor, the plain sum a pessimistic one. Where a measurement lands inside this [max, sum] interval reads out overlap quality before any profiler is opened, and profilers escalate only on residuals above a stated threshold. Deployment alternatives are compared by wall ordering -- which resource wall binds first as load grows -- rather than by point benchmarks. The account is compositional: new attention or state-space variants enter by declaring one module, and the workflow ships as a zero-dependency calculator plus an agent skill that enforces the discipline in agentic optimization loops. As a case study we analyze a DeepSeek-V3.2-style 671B MoE/MLA model on 16 NVIDIA H20 GPUs, whose ridge point of ~74 FLOP/byte (vs ~590 for H100) makes it an extreme decode-oriented part. The floors show TP16 decoding is KV-capacity-limited to ~70 concurrent 8K requests; sparse attention removes the KV-bandwidth term but not the capacity wall; an EP16+DP-attention layout accepts slightly worse same-batch weight traffic for an order-of-magnitude higher capacity wall (~644) -- while single-stream latency favors TP by 2.4x. The layout judgment is thus a computable function of the operating point, explaining why production deployments on identical hardware have shipped opposite attention layouts.
papers.title_zh: 在网格搜索之前先思考：面向大语言模型服务的下界优先分诊方法
papers.summary_cn: 该论文讨论大语言模型服务优化中常见的盲目网格搜索问题，主张在进行大规模基准测试或重型性能分析前，先做解析性的性能下界估计。作者提出 Floor First 分诊工作流，把每个解码步建模为多维资源向量，并用乐观与悲观界之间的区间来判断资源重叠质量与残差来源。论文进一步主张用“哪一面资源墙先成为瓶颈”来比较不同部署方案，而不是只看点状 benchmark。
innovations: 提出 Floor First 残差驱动分诊流程，把解析估计放在性能分析和优化的前置位置，减少盲目网格搜索。
将解码步骤抽象为包含显存带宽、算力、网络通信与 KV 容量等维度的资源向量，并用区间下界分析系统表现。
提出基于资源墙先后顺序的部署比较方法，用 operating point 驱动布局判断，而非仅依赖单点基准。
方法具有可组合性，新注意力或状态空间变体可以通过声明模块接入同一分析工作流。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于大语言模型推理服务的部署设计、性能诊断与容量规划，帮助工程团队在多种并行与注意力布局之间做更有依据的选择。尤其适合 AI Infra / Serving Systems 场景下，对延迟、吞吐与容量瓶颈进行前置分析与分诊。
papers.title_en: Think Before You Grid-Search: Floor-First Triage for LLM Serving

papers.title: Beyond the Leaderboard: A Synthesis of Tool-Use, Planning, and Reasoning Failures in Large Language Model Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to use tools, plan multi-step tasks, coordinate with other agents, and operate over extended horizons. Reported benchmark gains often obscure recurring failure modes documented across otherwise unrelated evaluation efforts. This paper synthesizes 27 benchmark, taxonomy, and audit papers (2023-2026), spanning 19 distinct benchmarks, into a cross-cutting taxonomy of agent limitations. To our knowledge, this is the first synthesis that integrates evidence across tool use, planning, long-horizon reasoning, multi-agent coordination, safety, and measurement validity into a single, unified taxonomy of LLM agent limitations. We identify six failure clusters: (1) tool invocation and parameter-level errors, (2) planning and constraint-satisfaction failures, (3) long-horizon degradation from context accumulation, (4) multi-agent coordination failures, (5) safety and security failures under adversarial or underspecified conditions, and (6) measurement validity problems. The taxonomy was derived iteratively by grouping independently reported error categories into themes corresponding to distinct stages of the agent reasoning-to-action pipeline. Across the literature, we find that failures compound nonlinearly with task length, that strong performance on individual sub-tasks does not reliably translate into end-to-end success, and that additional scaffolding does not consistently improve reliability. At the same time, substantial progress has been demonstrated in single-turn tool use, short-horizon web navigation, and narrowly scoped coding tasks.

papers.title_zh: 超越排行榜：大语言模型智能体中工具使用、规划与推理失败的综合研究
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文不是提出新模型，而是综合分析大语言模型智能体在工具使用、规划、长程推理、多智能体协作、安全性与评测有效性上的常见失败。作者汇总了 2023 至 2026 年间 27 篇基准、分类和审计论文，构建出统一的智能体局限性分类体系。研究表明，任务一旦变长，失败会非线性累积，而单项能力强并不代表端到端系统可靠。
innovations: 首次跨工具使用、规划、长程推理、多智能体协作、安全与测量有效性等维度，构建统一的智能体失败分类框架。
基于 27 篇文献、19 个基准整合证据，提炼出六类跨评测重复出现的失败簇。
从“推理到行动”流水线视角组织失败模式，强调不同阶段错误之间的复合效应。
指出排行榜提升可能掩盖系统性失效，为后续更可靠的智能体评测提供分析框架。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究和评估 LLM Agent 系统的场景，尤其是需要理解其在真实复杂任务中为何失败的研究者与工程团队。论文主要解决现有基准分散、排行榜结果难以揭示共性失效模式的问题。
papers.title_en: Beyond the Leaderboard: A Synthesis of Tool-Use, Planning, and Reasoning Failures in Large Language Model Agents

papers.title: Segmentation before Answering: Pixel Grounding for MLLM Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have evolved from static perception to interleaved visual-language reasoning, often referred to as ``thinking with images''. A basic operation in this reasoning process is to zoom in on regions of interest (often represented with bounding boxes) to acquire finer visual details. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Seg}mentation before \textbf{Answer}ing (SegAnswer), which shifts the unit of zoom-in from the popular bounding box to pixel-level segmentation mask. By employing fine-grained masks to isolate the target area from cluttered environments, segmented visual input yields a more precise region of interest, effectively filtering out redundant background and interfering objects. Furthermore, the discrete patches of segmented visual input align more seamlessly with how MLLMs structure visual tokens via positional embeddings. In experiments, we evaluate SegAnswer across diverse benchmarks, including high-resolution perception, general perception, and hallucination. It achieves consistent improvements and also exhibits considerable performance on segmentation tasks, validating its capability for reliable pixel grounding.

papers.title_zh: 先分割再回答：面向多模态大模型视觉推理的像素级对齐
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 SegAnswer，主张在多模态大模型进行视觉推理时，先使用像素级分割掩码而不是边界框来定位关注区域。作者认为，掩码能够更精确地隔离目标区域、过滤背景干扰，并与模型内部视觉 token 的组织方式更自然对齐。方法在高分辨率感知、通用感知和幻觉相关基准上均带来一致提升。
innovations: 提出“先分割再回答”的推理范式，将视觉放大与关注区域表示从边界框提升到像素级分割掩码。
利用分割后的输入抑制背景冗余和干扰物体，使模型获得更纯净、更精细的局部视觉证据。
指出离散化的分割区域与多模态大模型基于位置嵌入构建视觉 token 的机制更易对齐，从而改善推理过程。
在视觉推理增益之外，同时验证了方法在分割任务上的能力，体现了更可靠的像素级 grounding。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要精细区域理解的多模态视觉推理场景，如高分辨率图像分析、复杂背景下的目标识别和减少视觉幻觉的问答。它解决了仅用边界框定位时区域过粗、背景干扰大、与视觉 token 对齐不足的问题。
papers.title_en: Segmentation before Answering: Pixel Grounding for MLLM Visual Reasoning

papers.title: Detecting Vulnerability-Inducing Commits via Multi-Stage Reasoning with LLM-Based Agents
papers.abstract: Detecting vulnerability-inducing commits (VICs) at submission time is critical for improving the security and reliability of software systems. However, this task is highly challenging because it requires reasoning about the semantic impact of code changes from heterogeneous information sources, including code diffs, commit messages, and the surrounding contextual code. Existing approaches often struggle to fully capture these complex interactions, resulting in limited detection performance. In this paper, we propose VIC-RAGENT, an LLM-based multi-agent framework for effective and explainable vulnerability detection. VIC-RAGENT leverages multiple specialized agents to provide complementary perspectives, including structural analysis, intent understanding, and vulnerability inspection. To further improve detection reliability, the framework employs a multi-stage reasoning process that progressively refines candidate vulnerabilities through preliminary inspection, reanalysis, and a final decision stage. Experimental results on a real-world dataset across multiple LLMs demonstrate that VIC-RAGENT consistently outperforms baselines, including Direct, CoT, and CodeAgent. Compared to the strongest baseline, VIC-RAGENT achieves 1.2-1.7x higher F1-scores across different models. Overall, VIC-RAGENT offers a robust, explainable, and practical solution for detecting VICs in modern software development workflows.

papers.title_zh: 通过基于大语言模型智能体的多阶段推理检测引入漏洞的提交
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究在代码提交阶段检测“引入漏洞的提交”这一软件安全任务，目标是结合代码差异、提交信息与上下文代码进行语义层面的综合判断。作者提出 VIC-RAGENT，一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，通过不同专长的智能体协同完成结构分析、意图理解和漏洞检查。论文还设计了多阶段推理流程，对候选漏洞进行逐步复核与决策，以提升检测效果与可解释性。
innovations: 提出 VIC-RAGENT 多智能体框架，将结构分析、意图理解和漏洞检测等不同视角进行协同整合。
设计多阶段推理机制，包括初步检查、重新分析和最终决策，以逐步细化漏洞判断。
强调可解释的漏洞检测过程，不仅给出分类结果，也提供分阶段推理支撑。
将 LLM 智能体方法用于提交级漏洞诱因检测，面向真实软件开发流程中的早期安全筛查场景。
papers.scenario_cn: 用于软件开发与代码审查流程中，在提交进入主干或评审阶段时识别可能引入安全漏洞的代码变更。适用于需要结合 diff、提交说明和上下文代码进行综合安全判断的现代软件工程场景。
papers.title_en: Detecting Vulnerability-Inducing Commits via Multi-Stage Reasoning with LLM-Based Agents

papers.title: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations
papers.abstract: Putnam's Social Capital Theory is a foundational framework for collective action and community prosperity. However, traditional empirical methods face practical limits on control and replication. Meanwhile, LLM-based social simulations are typically behavior-driven and lack theory-aligned environments for modeling Putnam's core propositions. To address these gaps, we introduce SocaSim, an LLM-based multi-agent simulation framework to study Putnam's Social Capital Theory from theoretical blueprint to simulated reality. Specifically, we build an environment integrating social network evolution, trust dynamics, and norm propagation, where agents engage in repeated collective-action experiments, and then apply the three dimensions to analyze adaptation challenges in smart elderly care. Our simulations reproduce Putnam's macro-level patterns and exhibit strong human-agent alignment at the group level. Unlike traditional methods, SocaSim traces micro-level causal pathways of social network, trust, and norms via round-by-round simulations and counterfactual interventions, enabling process-level interpretability. Taken together, these capabilities establish a research paradigm that leverages LLM agents to bridge social science and computer science.

papers.title_zh: 从理论蓝图到模拟现实：用基于大语言模型的多智能体仿真建模并应用 Putnam 社会资本理论
papers.summary_cn: 该论文围绕 Putnam 社会资本理论，提出一个基于大语言模型的多智能体仿真框架 SocaSim，用于在可控、可复现实验环境中研究社会网络、信任与规范传播。作者让智能体在重复的集体行动实验中互动，并据此分析理论命题在仿真环境中的呈现方式。论文还将该框架应用于智慧养老适应性挑战分析，展示其连接社会科学理论与计算模拟的潜力。
innovations: 提出 SocaSim 框架，把社会网络演化、信任动态和规范传播整合进统一的多智能体仿真环境。
让 LLM 智能体仿真与 Putnam 社会资本理论的核心命题对齐，而不仅仅是做经验性的行为驱动模拟。
通过逐轮仿真与反事实干预追踪微观因果路径，增强过程级可解释性。
将该理论导向的仿真框架用于智慧养老场景，展示社会科学理论到实际应用问题分析的迁移方式。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于研究群体协作、社区治理、信任形成与社会规范传播等问题，也可用于需要可控社会实验环境的社会计算研究。论文展示的具体应用场景是智慧养老中的适应与协同问题分析。
papers.title_en: From Blueprint to Reality: Modeling and Applying Putnam's Social Capital Theory with LLM-based Multi-agent Simulations

papers.title: SCOPE: Leveraging Subgoal Critiques for Code Generation
papers.abstract: Code generation with large language models (LLMs) remains unreliable because generated programs can appear correct while still violating key semantic requirements in the natural language specification. Existing feedback-based methods improve over coder-only generation, but they often rely on unstructured critique or execution signals that do not explicitly identify what the code is semantically missing. We present SCOPE, a prover-initialized subgoal critic for code generation. SCOPE adapts a Lean-oriented prover model to produce three parseable feedback fields for downstream code generation: subgoals, gap analysis, and a robustness checklist. Our approach combines supervised fine-tuning, process-aligned reinforcement learning (RL), and feedback-guided inference, with two complementary rewards during RL: a dense reward for structured critique quality and a sparse reward based on whether the critique improves the coder's execution score. Experiments show that SCOPE improves over the compared feedback baselines. On LiveCodeBench V6, SCOPE achieves 39.4% pass@1, compared with 36.6% for Reflexion and 20.6% for the coder-only baseline. On BigCodeBench (Hard), it reaches 42.6%, surpassing Reflexion at 36.5% and coder-only generation at 34.5%. Further analysis shows that SCOPE's gains are concentrated in tasks with concrete semantic constraints and that its code corrections are more localized than Reflexion's.

papers.title_zh: SCOPE：利用子目标批判提升代码生成
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 SCOPE，一种用于代码生成的结构化反馈方法，旨在解决模型生成代码表面正确但语义上未满足需求的问题。SCOPE 使用经证明器初始化的评论模型，生成可解析的三类反馈：子目标、差距分析和鲁棒性检查清单，再将这些反馈用于后续代码生成。该方法结合监督微调、过程对齐强化学习和反馈引导推理，以提升代码修正的针对性和语义对齐能力。
innovations: 提出 prover-initialized subgoal critic，将证明器风格的推理能力迁移到代码生成反馈阶段。
把反馈结构化为子目标、差距分析和鲁棒性检查清单，较非结构化评论更明确指出语义缺失。
结合过程对齐强化学习，同时优化反馈质量本身以及反馈对代码执行结果的提升效果。
强调基于语义约束的局部修正，使代码改动更集中、更有针对性。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向自然语言需求中含有明确语义约束的代码生成任务，解决仅依赖执行反馈或非结构化评论时难以定位语义缺口的问题，适用于编程助手、自动补全与代码修复等场景。
papers.title_en: SCOPE: Leveraging Subgoal Critiques for Code Generation

papers.title: FreqDepthKV: Frequency-Guided Depth Sharing for Robust KV Cache Compression in Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Long-context LLM inference is increasingly limited by the memory and bandwidth cost of KV caches, yet aggressive compression can remove the layer-specific evidence needed for retrieval and multi-step reasoning. We introduce FreqDepthKV, an inference-time cache compression method that factorizes adjacent-layer KV states into shared low-frequency depth components and sparse high-frequency residuals. A lightweight online probe assigns attention heads to shared-depth, residual-depth, or exact cache modes according to their contribution to reconstruction-sensitive attention logits, allowing the compression policy to adapt to prompt structure without retraining. Across long-context question answering, needle retrieval, summarization, and code generation benchmarks, FreqDepthKV preserves task accuracy under substantially smaller cache budgets. With a 32k-token prefill window, FreqDepthKV reaches 58.3 Exact Match, 63.0 F1, 32.5 ROUGE-L, and 48.1 pass@1, closely matching full KV while outperforming prior compressed-cache methods. It also improves decoding throughput to 70.4 tokens/s, reduces TTFT to 2.06 seconds, and lowers peak KV memory to 6.2 GB, achieving a 3.9x effective compression ratio.

papers.title_zh: FreqDepthKV：面向稳健 KV 缓存压缩的频率引导深度共享方法（用于长上下文 LLM 推理）
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 FreqDepthKV，用于在长上下文大语言模型推理中压缩 KV cache，以缓解显存占用和带宽开销过大的问题。方法在推理时将相邻层的 KV 状态分解为共享的低频深度成分和稀疏的高频残差，并按注意力头的重要性动态选择压缩模式。作者强调该方法无需重新训练模型，且在问答、检索、摘要和代码生成等长上下文任务上，能在更小缓存预算下尽量保持接近完整 KV cache 的效果。
innovations: 提出基于频率分解的跨层 KV 状态压缩思路，将相邻层表示拆分为共享低频成分与高频残差。
设计轻量级在线探针，根据注意力 logits 对重建敏感性的贡献，为不同注意力头自适应分配共享、残差或精确保留模式。
实现无需重训练的推理时自适应压缩策略，可随提示结构变化动态调整缓存保留方式。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向长上下文 LLM 推理中 KV cache 成本过高的问题，适用于长文问答、needle retrieval、长文本摘要、多步推理和代码生成等需要大上下文窗口的在线推理场景。
papers.title_en: FreqDepthKV: Frequency-Guided Depth Sharing for Robust KV Cache Compression in Long-Context LLM Inference

papers.title: AVA-VLM: Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model for In-the-Wild Construction Site Monitoring
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are promising for construction-site monitoring, and recent construction-tailored VLMs have primarily adapted pretrained VLMs through direct QA-style fine-tuning from a single global image. We argue that this direct paradigm remains limited for in-the-wild deployment in terms of operational range, reliability under reduced-resolution inputs, and inference efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose AVA-VLM, an Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model that follows a human-inspired coarse-to-fine reasoning strategy. AVA-VLM first reasons over a low-resolution global image and selectively requests a high-resolution local crop only when detailed inspection is needed, similar to how a human inspector zooms in on hard-to-see yet important areas. We further introduce a region-aware Chain-of-Thought dataset that teaches the model when to inspect, where to crop, and how to use local evidence. Experiments show that AVA-VLM improves reliability under long-distance and reduced-resolution conditions while substantially reducing visual-token usage.

papers.title_zh: AVA-VLM：面向真实施工现场监测的自适应视觉注意力视觉语言模型
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 AVA-VLM，用于真实施工现场监测，旨在提升现有施工领域视觉语言模型在远距离、低分辨率和部署效率上的表现。方法采用类似人工巡检的粗到细策略，先基于低分辨率全局图像进行判断，仅在必要时请求高分辨率局部裁剪进行细查。作者还构建了区域感知的思维链数据，以教会模型何时放大、放大哪里以及如何利用局部证据。
innovations: 提出自适应视觉注意机制，将施工现场监测建模为先全局粗看、再按需局部细看的两阶段推理流程。
只在需要时请求高分辨率局部裁剪，兼顾远距离场景下的可靠性和视觉 token 使用效率。
构建区域感知的 Chain-of-Thought 数据集，用于联合学习检查时机、裁剪位置和局部证据利用方式。
针对真实施工场景中的低清晰度和复杂环境问题，设计更贴近人工巡检流程的视觉语言建模方式。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于施工现场安全巡检、设备与环境监测等真实部署场景，特别是在目标距离远、输入分辨率受限、推理资源有限时更有价值。它解决了传统单张全局图像直接问答在细节检查能力、鲁棒性和效率之间难以兼顾的问题。
papers.title_en: AVA-VLM: Adaptive Visual Attention-Vision Language Model for In-the-Wild Construction Site Monitoring

papers.title: Akashic: A Low-Overhead LLM Inference Service with MemAttention
papers.abstract: Recent LLM-based agent systems continuously accumulate context across multi-turn interactions, tool invocations, and cross-session workflows. Replaying the full history for every request quickly becomes impractical: long contexts increase prefill cost, may exceed context limits, and often bury task-relevant evidence in irrelevant content, degrading both serving efficiency and output quality. We propose Akashic, a low-overhead memory system built around MemAttention, which organizes context into bounded chunks and models semantic relationships across chunks, preserving cross-chunk evidence without repeatedly rewriting the full history. Akashic further applies hardware-software co-designed memory placement to co-locate likely co-retrieved chunks, reducing retrieval fragmentation and I/O overhead. Across four representative workloads and three model sizes, Akashic improves task accuracy by up to 10.2 points, throughput by up to 1.21x, and sustainable request rate by up to 1.88x over strong prior memory baselines.

papers.title_zh: Akashic：基于 MemAttention 的低开销大语言模型推理服务系统
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 Akashic，一个面向 LLM Agent 场景的低开销推理记忆系统，用来避免在多轮交互和工具调用中反复重放完整历史上下文。其核心是 MemAttention，将上下文组织成有界块，并建模块间语义关系，从而在不持续改写全量历史的情况下保留跨块证据。论文还结合软硬件协同的内存放置策略，降低检索碎片化和 I/O 开销。
innovations: 提出 MemAttention 机制，将长历史上下文划分为有界块并显式建模跨块语义关联，以支持跨块证据保留。
将记忆系统与推理服务结合，避免每次请求都重放完整会话历史，兼顾效率与生成质量。
引入软硬件协同的内存放置策略，把可能被共同检索的上下文块尽量共置，减少检索碎片和 I/O 成本。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向 Agent 系统、多轮对话、跨会话工作流和频繁工具调用场景，解决上下文持续累积导致的预填充成本高、上下文超长和关键信息被噪声淹没等问题，适用于需要长期记忆支持的 LLM 推理服务。
papers.title_en: Akashic: A Low-Overhead LLM Inference Service with MemAttention

papers.title: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache Compression
papers.abstract: Long-context language model inference is increasingly limited by the memory bandwidth and capacity required to store key-value caches, yet existing compression methods often apply uniform budgets across layers or tokens and degrade retrieval when lexical cues and semantic states require different preservation. We introduce DepthWeave-KV, a token-adaptive cache compression method that factorizes key and value states across neighboring transformer layers using shared low-rank channel bases while retaining lightweight token-specific residuals where attention behavior is sensitive. DepthWeave-KV combines cross-depth residual factorization with a token-conditional depth router that allocates higher reconstruction rank to instruction-bearing and retrieval-critical tokens, and uses calibration-free online error tracking from attention-output probes to adapt compression during generation without retraining the base model. A fused CUDA implementation jointly performs basis lookup, residual dequantization, and attention projection to reduce decode-time memory traffic. Across LongBench, Needle-in-a-Haystack, L-Eval, and long-form QA and summarization benchmarks, DepthWeave-KV achieves near-full-cache task quality with substantially lower memory use, improving average score and retrieval accuracy over prior compressed caches while reaching 8.3x KV memory reduction and 72.8 tokens per second at 64K context.

papers.title_zh: DepthWeave-KV：面向长上下文 KV 缓存压缩的 Token 自适应跨层残差分解方法
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文提出 DepthWeave-KV，用于压缩长上下文语言模型推理中的 KV cache，目标是在降低显存与带宽压力的同时尽量保留检索和理解能力。方法通过在相邻 Transformer 层之间做共享低秩通道基分解，同时对关键 token 保留轻量级残差，从而实现跨层压缩。论文还引入 token 条件路由与在线误差跟踪机制，使压缩强度能在生成过程中自适应调整，且无需重训练基础模型。
innovations: 提出跨层残差分解方案，在相邻层之间共享低秩通道基，并为敏感 token 保留特定残差表示。
设计 token-conditional depth router，对指令相关和检索关键 token 分配更高的重建容量，实现按 token 自适应压缩。
引入基于注意力输出探针的在线误差跟踪机制，在不做额外校准和重训练的情况下动态调整压缩策略。
实现融合式 CUDA 执行路径，将基查找、残差反量化和注意力投影联合处理，以降低解码阶段内存访问开销。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向长上下文 LLM 推理中统一压缩预算难以兼顾不同层和不同 token 重要性的问题，适用于长文检索、长表单问答、长摘要和其他需要大窗口推理且对 KV cache 成本敏感的部署场景。
papers.title_en: DepthWeave-KV: Token-Adaptive Cross-Layer Residual Factorization for Long-Context KV Cache Compression

papers.title: Bridging Diffusion Pruning and Step Distillation with Teacher-Aligned Repair
papers.abstract: Diffusion models generate high-quality images, but their inference cost comes from two sources: large denoising networks and repeated denoising steps. Existing compression pipelines usually attack these costs separately. Pruning reduces the network, but most pruning methods still rely on a long post-pruning retraining stage to recover a many-step sampler. Step distillation reduces the number of denoising steps, but it usually assumes a student that can already follow the teacher well enough to receive useful distillation gradients. This paper asks whether post-pruning retraining can be replaced by step distillation. We find that the direct replacement fails: after pruning an EDM2-XS teacher, starting SiDA from the pruned checkpoint produces unusable samples. We introduce a short teacher-alignment repair stage as a bridge between pruning and step distillation. The bridge matches the pruned generator to the teacher on noisy real-image latents, then hands the repaired checkpoint to one-step distillation. On ImageNet-512, the original EDM2-XS baseline uses 124.713M parameters and 63 network evaluations, reaching an FID of 3.53. With a suitable distillation objective, our 20% pruned one-step generator uses 98.826M parameters and one network evaluation, reaching an FID of 3.12. With 30% pruning, the model uses 88.029M parameters and one network evaluation, with an FID of 4.26.

papers.title_zh: 用教师对齐修复连接扩散剪枝与步数蒸馏
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究如何同时降低扩散模型的网络规模与采样步数开销，尝试用步数蒸馏替代剪枝后的长时间恢复训练。作者发现，剪枝后直接进行一步蒸馏会失败，因此提出一个简短的“教师对齐修复”阶段，先让剪枝后的生成器在带噪真实图像潜变量上重新贴近教师模型，再交给一步蒸馏。结果表明，这一桥接流程能够把剪枝与步数蒸馏有效串联起来，在压缩参数量的同时保留较强生成质量。
innovations: 指出“剪枝后直接做步数蒸馏”这一看似自然的替代方案会失效，并明确分析了两类压缩流程之间的衔接问题。
提出教师对齐修复阶段，在真实图像的带噪潜变量上对齐剪枝模型与教师模型，作为剪枝与一步蒸馏之间的桥梁。
将网络剪枝与一步采样蒸馏整合为统一压缩流程，同时针对扩散模型压缩中的双重推理开销进行处理。
papers.scenario_cn: 用于图像扩散模型推理加速与压缩，适合需要同时减少模型参数量和去噪采样步数的生成式图像任务部署场景。
papers.title_en: Bridging Diffusion Pruning and Step Distillation with Teacher-Aligned Repair

papers.title: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation
papers.abstract: Traffic signs are crucial components of road safety, serving as visual tools under all lighting conditions. The Manual on Uniform Traffic Control Devices (MUTCD) specifies daytime visual factors such as legibility and color contrast, and nighttime retroreflectivity requirements. Traditional assessment methods rely on manual inspections, which the Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) notes are subjective, labor-intensive and pose safety concerns, while retroreflectometers are expensive and unaffordable for smaller agencies. Most existing studies focus on either daytime factors or nighttime retroreflectivity but rarely integrate both aspects comprehensively. This study develops a novel framework that systematically evaluates traffic signs through integrated daytime-nighttime assessment. The methodology employs three fine-tuned Vision Language Models (VLMs) for daytime visual performance assessment across four key factors: legibility, color, surface and shape integrity, and surrounding environment conditions. VLM predictions are converted to numerical scores through sentiment analysis and Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) scoring, while nighttime performance is assessed using LiDAR-derived retroreflectivity following established calibration procedures. The framework integrates these components into a comprehensive Sign Condition Index (SCI) for maintenance guidance. Evaluation results demonstrated that LLaVA and Qwen outperformed InternVL, achieving bidirectional cosine similarity scores of 0.67-0.76 across all factors. Among 462 validated traffic signs, 68 were flagged by the proposed framework as requiring immediate replacement due to inadequate retroreflectivity performance. This research provides a cost-effective alternative to traditional manual inspections for comprehensive traffic sign condition assessment.

papers.title_zh: 一种融合白天视觉表现与夜间逆反射评估的增强型视觉语言模型交通标志综合状态评估框架
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出一个交通标志综合状态评估框架，将白天视觉表现与夜间逆反射能力纳入统一评估体系。方法使用三个微调后的视觉语言模型评估白天条件下的可读性、颜色、表面与形状完整性以及周边环境，并结合基于 LiDAR 的夜间逆反射评估，最终形成综合的标志状态指数。论文强调该框架可作为人工巡检和昂贵专用设备之外的一种更经济替代方案。
innovations: 提出统一的昼夜一体化交通标志状态评估框架，而不是只评估白天视觉因素或夜间逆反射中的单一方面。
使用多个微调视觉语言模型对多类白天视觉指标进行评估，并通过情感分析和 CLIP 评分将预测转换为数值化结果。
将 LiDAR 派生的夜间逆反射评估结果与白天视觉评估进行融合，构建综合性的 Sign Condition Index。
面向实际道路维护需求，将视觉语言模型评估与可操作的维护指导目标结合起来。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于道路交通标志巡检、养护优先级评估和中小型机构的低成本基础设施维护场景，解决人工巡检主观性强、劳动成本高，以及夜间逆反射专用设备昂贵的问题。尤其适合需要同时考虑白天可视性和夜间安全性的综合评估任务。
papers.title_en: A VLM-Enhanced Framework for Comprehensive Traffic Sign Condition Assessment Integrating Daytime Visual Performance and Nighttime Retroreflectivity Evaluation

papers.title: Analysis-by-Proxy: Localization Signals in VLMs Operating as Condition Encoders
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly utilized as the conditioning backbone for diffusion-based image editing due to their remarkable multimodal reasoning capabilities. While standalone VLMs demonstrate strong localization capabilities, editing pipelines frequently struggle to maintain this accuracy, particularly in complex, multi-entity scenes. In this work, we investigate this performance gap, hypothesizing that it stems from treating the VLM as a condition encoder. In this role, the model is restricted to a single forward pass, preventing the autoregressive generation process for which it was optimized, thereby failing to fully expose its capabilities. To investigate whether this spatial understanding persists when the VLM is used as a condition encoder, we introduce Analysis-by-Proxy. In this framework, we train a lightweight, interpretable proxy model on the VLM's intermediate representations using an auxiliary localization task. By analyzing the VLM through this proxy, we uncover the specific VLM representations that encode localization information. Our findings expose a fundamental mismatch between how spatial knowledge is represented within a VLM condition encoder and how it is extracted by current editing pipelines. We reveal that under single-pass constraints, the localization signal does not reliably propagate to the predefined layer configurations commonly used for conditioning. Instead, this crucial signal remains hidden within intermediate representations, at locations that vary depending on the input prompt. Using our introduced Analysis-by-Proxy framework, we reveal the fundamental failures of existing condition extraction strategies in editing pipelines, opening the door to more principled design of conditioning architectures.

papers.title_zh: 代理式分析：作为条件编码器运行的视觉语言模型中的定位信号
papers.summary_cn: 这篇论文研究视觉语言模型（VLM）作为扩散式图像编辑的条件编码器时，为什么其空间定位能力在实际编辑流水线中表现不稳定。作者提出 Analysis-by-Proxy 框架，在 VLM 的中间表示上训练一个轻量且可解释的代理模型，通过辅助定位任务分析哪些表示真正编码了定位信息。结果表明，现有编辑流水线提取条件的方式与 VLM 内部空间知识的分布存在错配，导致关键定位信号没有被稳定利用。
innovations: 提出 Analysis-by-Proxy 分析框架，用可解释的轻量代理模型探测 VLM 中间表示里的定位信息。
从“VLM 被当作单次前向的条件编码器”这一视角解释编辑性能下降，揭示其与自回归优化目标之间的根本不匹配。
发现关键定位信号往往隐藏在中间层表示中，而不是稳定出现在现有条件提取配置所依赖的预定义层。
指出定位信号的位置会随输入提示而变化，说明固定层提取策略难以稳健工作。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向基于扩散模型的图像编辑，尤其适用于多实体、复杂场景下需要精确文本定位与条件控制的场景。论文主要解决 VLM 具备空间理解能力但在作为编辑条件编码器时难以被流水线正确读取的问题。
papers.title_en: Analysis-by-Proxy: Localization Signals in VLMs Operating as Condition Encoders

papers.title: Load Balancing under Adaptive Bin Deletions
papers.abstract: We analyze a balls-and-bins game against an adaptive adversary that sequentially deletes bins. Starting with $n$ balls distributed across $n$ bins, the adversary deletes a bin in each step, forcing the algorithm to redistribute its balls to surviving bins. We prove that after $n/2$ rounds, uniform random redistribution yields optimal $O(n)$ recourse and $O(\frac{\log n}{\log \log n})$ maximum load. Furthermore, we show that applying the ``power of two choices'' reduces the maximum load to $O(\log \log n)$ while maintaining linear recourse. We also consider a variation of this game where the balls from the deleted bin are partitioned evenly among $d \ll n$ random bins rather than being redistributed independently. We demonstrate that keeping the balls together ($d=1$), which gives small maximum load and recourse against an oblivious adversary, fails against an adaptive adversary. Nevertheless, we show that splitting the balls into just two groups ($d=2$) is sufficient to recover linear recourse and efficient load balancing in the adaptive setting.

papers.title_zh: 自适应删桶下的负载均衡
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究一种对抗性 balls-and-bins 负载均衡问题：系统中的桶会被自适应对手逐步删除，被删桶中的球必须重新分配到剩余桶中。作者分析了不同重分配策略在删桶过程中的代价与最大负载表现，证明均匀随机重分配可以达到线性级别的迁移代价与最优量级的最大负载。进一步地，论文表明 two-choice 策略可在保持线性迁移代价的同时，进一步改善最大负载表现。
innovations: 提出并系统分析了一个面向自适应删桶对手的动态负载均衡博弈模型。
证明均匀随机重分配在删桶过程中可同时实现线性迁移代价与最优量级的最大负载界。
证明“两个选择的幂”策略在自适应删桶场景下可进一步降低最大负载，同时保持线性迁移代价。
研究了删桶后成组分裂重分配的变体，并表明仅将球分成两组就足以恢复良好的负载均衡与迁移代价表现。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于资源节点会动态下线、失效或被移除的分布式系统、缓存系统、任务调度和服务承载场景。论文关注的是在节点持续减少时，如何控制迁移开销并避免剩余节点负载过高。
papers.title_en: Load Balancing under Adaptive Bin Deletions

papers.title: Bridging Physical Reasoning and Task Generalization via Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to generalize in interactive physical reasoning, particularly under unseen tasks and environments. Two key failure modes are prominent: hallucinated chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that contradicts physical reality, and misalignment between the model's reasoning and actions. We present VAORA (Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment), a novel reward design that directly addresses both issues. VAORA introduces two complementary rewards: Visual Alignment Reward, which anchors VLM reasoning to the visual context independent of the agent action itself, and Visual-Action Alignment Reward, which grounds reasoning in the visual outcome induced by the model's action. Together, these rewards suppress hallucinated CoT and reduce the gap between reasoning and behavior. To improve training stability, we further employ smooth, dense rewards by estimating success probabilities using a pre-trained in-domain expert agent. Experiments on PHYRE and Virtual Tool support our performances across novel-task and unseen-environment settings, confirming that grounded and generalizable physical intelligence can be induced through VAORA.

papers.title_zh: 通过视觉动作结果推理对齐连接物理推理与任务泛化
papers.summary_cn: 该论文面向视觉语言模型在交互式物理推理中的泛化问题，重点解决在新任务和新环境下推理与行动不一致、以及推理内容脱离物理现实的现象。作者提出 VAORA，通过奖励设计同时约束模型的推理要与视觉上下文一致，也要与其动作导致的视觉结果一致。为提升训练稳定性，方法还利用预训练领域专家估计成功概率，构造更平滑、更密集的奖励信号。
innovations: 提出 VAORA 奖励设计，联合处理物理推理中的两类关键问题：幻觉式思维链和推理-行动失配。
设计 Visual Alignment Reward，使模型推理与视觉上下文保持一致，而不只依赖动作本身。
设计 Visual-Action Alignment Reward，将推理约束到动作引发的视觉结果上，增强行为与推理的一致性。
利用预训练领域专家估计成功概率，构造平滑且稠密的奖励，以提升训练稳定性。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要在视觉环境中进行交互式物理推理的智能体场景，例如工具使用、物体交互、仿真环境中的任务执行等。重点面向未见任务和未见环境下的泛化能力提升。
papers.title_en: Bridging Physical Reasoning and Task Generalization via Visual Action Outcome Reasoning Alignment

papers.title: Clustered Codebook Quantization for 2D Gaussian-based Image Compression
papers.abstract: Gaussian-based image representations effectively model image content using compact parametric primitives while preserving high visual fidelity, yet storing a large number of floating-point parameters per primitive degrades rate-distortion efficiency at higher fidelity targets. To improve the rate-distortion performance in Gaussian representation, we present our Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization (CGVQ), a Gaussian primitive based image compression method. Our key idea is to partition Gaussian parameters further into homogeneous groups prior to quantization, enabling higher compression efficiency and accurate parameter reconstruction. In practice, our extensive experiments show that CGVQ decreases the bpp by 20% with respect to our baseline, while maintaining on-par visual quality

papers.title_zh: 面向二维高斯图像压缩的聚类码本量化
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注基于高斯原语的图像表示在高保真压缩场景下参数存储成本过高的问题。作者提出一种聚类引导的向量量化方法，在量化前先把高斯参数划分为更同质的若干组，从而提升压缩效率并改善参数重建质量。实验表明，该方法在保持视觉质量接近基线的同时，能够降低码率开销。
innovations: 提出 Cluster-Guided Vector Quantization（CGVQ），将聚类分组与高斯表示量化结合起来。
在量化前对高斯参数进行同质化分组，以提高码本表示效率并减少失真。
面向高保真目标下高斯图像表示的率失真瓶颈，优化了参数存储与重建之间的权衡。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于基于二维高斯原语的图像压缩与存储场景，尤其适合追求高视觉质量同时希望进一步降低码率的图像表示系统。
papers.title_en: Clustered Codebook Quantization for 2D Gaussian-based Image Compression

papers.title: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail
papers.abstract: Large language models deployed in open-world applications require safety guardrails that are both robust to complex risks and efficient enough for low-latency runtime moderation. Existing guardrails face a practical trade-off between lightweight classification-based models, which are efficient but often struggle with concealed intent, ambiguous semantics, and borderline safety decisions, and reasoning-based guards, which improve judgment quality but introduce additional token generation and inference latency. We present DT-Guard, a content safety guardrail model based on a Reasoning-Active Training, Reasoning-Free Inference paradigm. The key idea is to use reasoning supervision during training while emitting only structured safety labels at inference time. DT-Guard formulates safety judgment as a progressive decision process, Intent - Category - Safety, and constructs an intent-driven dataset with intent labels, risk categories, safety labels, and structured reasoning trajectories. To further improve hard-case robustness, we propose Rollout-Guided Progressive Hard-Case Optimization (RG-PHO), which uses multi-rollout consistency to identify stably mastered, persistently failed, and preference-unstable samples, and applies targeted supervised and preference optimization accordingly. At inference time, DT-Guard directly generates structured labels without explicit reasoning traces, preserving deployment efficiency. Experiments on prompt-side and response-side safety benchmarks show that DT-Guard achieves average F1 scores of 0.886 and 0.870, respectively. With only a 4B backbone, it reaches a dual-side average F1 of 0.878, outperforming strong 8B guardrail baselines. These results demonstrate that reasoning supervision can be effectively internalized into low-latency safety discrimination.

papers.title_zh: DT-Guard：面向意图驱动的主动推理训练，用于免推理的大语言模型安全护栏
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出 DT-Guard，一种兼顾安全判断质量与低延迟部署效率的大语言模型安全护栏方法。其核心思想是在训练阶段使用推理监督提升模型对隐含意图、模糊语义和边界案例的识别能力，但在推理阶段只输出结构化安全标签，不显式生成推理过程。论文还构建了意图驱动的数据组织方式，并提出针对困难样本的渐进式优化方法，以增强模型在复杂安全场景中的鲁棒性。
innovations: 提出“训练时主动推理、推理时免推理”的安全护栏范式，将推理能力内化为低延迟分类能力。
将安全判断建模为 Intent-Category-Safety 的渐进决策过程，并构建包含意图、风险类别、安全标签和结构化推理轨迹的数据集。
提出 RG-PHO，通过多次 rollout 一致性区分不同类型的困难样本，并结合定向监督与偏好优化进行强化。
实现推理阶段只输出结构化安全标签，无需显式生成推理链，从而兼顾部署效率与判断质量。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于开放场景下的大语言模型输入审核、输出审核和在线内容安全护栏系统。特别适合既要求低时延，又需要对隐含风险、模糊表达和边界样本保持较强判别能力的部署环境。
papers.title_en: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail

papers.title: Dynamic Evaluation of Classical and Control-Aware Optimal Trajectory Planning in Robot Manipulators
papers.abstract: Trajectory planning strongly influences tracking accuracy, actuator demand, and overall execution behavior in robotic manipulators. Classical planners such as cubic, quintic, and trapezoidal profiles are widely used for their simplicity and smoothness, yet they remain purely kinematic and ignore system dynamics and control effort during trajectory generation. As a result, nominally smooth trajectories can lead to inefficient nonlinear execution and increased corrective control action. This paper presents a control-aware optimal trajectory planning framework that explicitly incorporates manipulator dynamics and actuator effort within a finite-horizon formulation. A midpoint linearization strategy is introduced to improve approximation accuracy for large point-to-point motions. In contrast to prior comparisons, the proposed approach enables fair, isolated evaluation of trajectory generation effects under identical closed-loop nonlinear execution conditions. To this end, a unified evaluation framework is developed in which all planners are executed under identical nonlinear dynamics, controller structure, and actuator constraints. Simulations on a nonlinear simplified UR5 manipulator show that the proposed approach consistently reduces tracking error, corrective torque, and closed-loop execution cost compared to classical methods, achieving substantial reductions in actuator effort and execution cost across all evaluated scenarios, demonstrating that kinematic smoothness alone does not ensure dynamically efficient execution.

papers.title_zh: 机器人机械臂中经典与控制感知最优轨迹规划的动态评估
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究机器人机械臂的轨迹规划对跟踪精度、执行效率和执行器负载的影响，并比较经典运动学轨迹规划方法与控制感知的最优轨迹规划方法。作者提出一种有限时域下的控制感知轨迹规划框架，将机械臂动力学和执行器控制代价显式纳入轨迹生成过程。论文还设计了统一评测框架，在相同非线性动力学、控制器结构和执行器约束下公平比较不同规划器的闭环执行效果。
innovations: 提出控制感知的最优轨迹规划框架，在轨迹生成阶段显式考虑机械臂动力学与执行器控制代价。
引入中点线性化策略，以提升大范围点到点运动下的近似精度。
构建统一评测框架，在一致的闭环非线性执行条件下隔离并比较不同轨迹生成方法的影响。
papers.scenario_cn: 面向机器人机械臂的点到点运动规划与轨迹跟踪控制，适用于需要兼顾跟踪误差、控制力矩开销和执行效率的工业操作、抓取与自动化执行场景。
papers.title_en: Dynamic Evaluation of Classical and Control-Aware Optimal Trajectory Planning in Robot Manipulators

papers.title: EAGOR: Embodied Reasoning in Omni-direction
papers.abstract: Omni-directional (360°) cameras provide embodied agents with a holistic view of their surroundings, making them suited for directional reasoning in tasks such as navigation and object search. Existing Vision Language Models (VLMs) project 360° observations to 2D equirectangular projection (ERP) images and process them using architectures designed for perspective images. However, they ignore the spherical nature of 360° observations, where each pixel represents a viewing direction relative to the agent. Consequently, their direction estimates often become inconsistent under camera view transformations caused by agent motion. This limitation is particularly critical for map-free navigation, where the agent must continuously estimate the target direction in its egocentric frame. We propose EAGOR, a training-free, geometry-aware framework for embodied 360° directional reasoning. Instead of predicting target directions as ERP image coordinates, EAGOR formulates directional reasoning as recursive Bayesian estimation directly on the sphere. It maintains a continuous belief over target directions and propagates it equivariantly under agent motion without training the backbone VLMs. To achieve this, we introduce the Spherical Harmonic Belief Field (SH-BF), whose spherical harmonic representation provides a globally defined, rotation-aware basis for directional estimation on the spherical manifold. This formulation eliminates ERP seam discontinuities, latitude distortions, and interpolation errors. We evaluate EAGOR on two benchmark datasets and real-world experiments with a legged robot across directional reasoning tasks. EAGOR consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving average relative gains of +34.4% and +45.6% on HOS and OSR-Bench, respectively, while improving navigation success by +14.6%, reducing step count by 17.7%, and lowering mean angular error by 24.5%.

papers.title_zh: EAGOR：全向具身推理
papers.summary_cn: 该论文关注具身智能体在 360° 全景视觉输入下的方向推理问题，尤其是导航和目标搜索等任务。作者指出，现有视觉语言模型通常把全景观测投影为二维图像处理，忽略了球面观测的几何属性，从而在智能体运动后容易出现方向估计不一致。为此，论文提出无需训练、具备几何感知能力的 EAGOR，在球面上以递归贝叶斯估计方式持续维护目标方向信念。
innovations: 提出训练自由的几何感知框架 EAGOR，直接在球面而非二维投影坐标上进行方向推理。
将方向估计表述为球面上的递归贝叶斯估计，可在智能体运动时对目标方向信念进行等变传播。
提出球谐信念场（SH-BF），利用球谐表示提供全局定义且具旋转感知能力的方向估计基底。
该表示避免了等距柱状投影中的接缝不连续、纬度畸变和插值误差。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于依赖 360° 相机的具身导航、目标搜索和无地图定向推理场景，尤其适合机器人在运动过程中持续估计目标相对方向的任务。
papers.title_en: EAGOR: Embodied Reasoning in Omni-direction

papers.title: Estimating Uncertainty from Reasoning: A Large-Scale Study of Multi- and Crosslingual MCQA Performance in LLMs
papers.abstract: Uncertainty estimation (UE) enables LLM-powered systems to recognize when to abstain, yet existing research has predominantly focused on English. We present the first large-scale evaluation of UE methods across 22 languages, spanning high-, mid-, and low-resource settings. Using two human-curated Q\&A datasets, we compare open and closed box UE methods (nine in total) across different model sizes and architectures while eliciting long-form reasoning, avoiding LLM-as-a-judge and embedding-based scoring, which can introduce evaluation noise. We report three main actionable findings. First, we find that prompting models to reason in English while keeping questions in low-resource languages substantially improves UE performance, suggesting that comprehension of low-resource languages is largely intact, and that the reliability bottleneck lies in generation rather than understanding. Second, prompting models to reason in English closes the UE performance gap between low and high-resource languages, demonstrating that generation language matters more than the question language. Third, the choice of UE method should depend on model scale: at smaller scales, open-box probability-based methods outperform alternatives; at larger scales, closed-box self-verbalized uncertainty becomes superior. Finally, we provide an analysis of threshold selection for selective prediction, offering guidance on calibrating abstention in multilingual settings.

papers.title_zh: 从推理中估计不确定性：大型语言模型在多语言与跨语言多项选择问答中的大规模研究
papers.summary_cn: 该论文系统研究大语言模型在 22 种语言上的不确定性估计能力，目标是帮助模型知道何时应当放弃作答。作者基于两个人工整理的问答数据集，对九种开箱与闭箱不确定性估计方法进行了大规模比较，并要求模型生成长链条推理过程。研究重点分析了问题语言、推理语言、模型规模和不确定性估计方法选择之间的关系。
innovations: 首次在覆盖高、中、低资源语言的 22 种语言范围内，对大语言模型不确定性估计方法进行大规模系统评测。
发现对低资源语言问题使用英文推理提示，能够显著提升不确定性估计表现，并缩小不同资源语言之间的性能差距。
给出与模型规模相关的方法选择结论：小模型更适合基于概率的开箱方法，大模型则更适合自述式不确定性方法。
分析了选择性预测中的阈值设定问题，为多语言场景下的弃答校准提供了实践指导。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于多语言问答、风险敏感型 LLM 系统和需要可靠弃答机制的应用场景，如跨语言知识问答、教育评测、客服和高风险决策辅助系统。
papers.title_en: Estimating Uncertainty from Reasoning: A Large-Scale Study of Multi- and Crosslingual MCQA Performance in LLMs

papers.title: SCOReD: Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) distillation in the recommendation domain is a necessary precursor to RL training, but raw teacher traces are ill-suited to this task. Large teachers approach the recommendation task with unusually high reasoning uncertainty, repeatedly rechecking their answers without revising them; supervised fine-tuning on such traces produces verbose students that never revise their initial guess. Furthermore, due to the novelty of the recommendation domain, the teacher's reasoning traces are highly out-of-distribution for the small student LLM. We propose Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation (SCOReD), a CoT optimization framework tailored to recommendation that first parses each teacher trace into typed segments and uses the student LLM's attention to score the importance of each segment. Then SCOReD dynamically selects a per-segment edit (KEEP / REWRITE / FUSE / PRUNE) based on the output length and comparative log probability lift of the answer given the edit as per the student. Therefore, SCOReD prunes redundant sections of the reasoning trace while preserving information-dense sections and adapts raw teacher traces to the student's output distribution. Training on SCOReD-optimized CoTs provides a cleaner learning signal to the student model and improves over baseline SFT by 1.56% NDCG and 1.9% Recall@5, while reducing reasoning length by 27.3%.

papers.title_zh: SCOReD：面向推荐蒸馏的学生感知式思维链优化
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究推荐领域中的思维链蒸馏问题，指出原始教师推理轨迹往往冗长、反复确认且不符合小模型的分布特性，直接用于监督微调会削弱学生效果。为此，作者提出 SCOReD 框架，先将教师轨迹解析为不同类型片段，再依据学生模型对片段的重要性评估，动态执行保留、改写、融合或裁剪。这样可以在保留关键信息的同时清理冗余推理，为学生模型提供更适配的学习信号。
innovations: 提出学生感知式思维链优化框架 SCOReD，针对推荐任务中的教师推理轨迹做蒸馏前编辑。
将教师轨迹解析为类型化片段，并利用学生模型注意力评估各片段的重要性。
基于输出长度与答案概率提升，动态选择 KEEP、REWRITE、FUSE、PRUNE 等编辑操作，使教师思维链更贴近学生分布。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于推荐系统中的大模型到小模型蒸馏，尤其适合需要先优化教师思维链质量、再进行监督微调或后续强化学习训练的场景。
papers.title_en: SCOReD: Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation

papers.title: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning is commonly used to train large language models using environmental feedback. In applied settings, the environment usually provides sparse or delayed feedback. This makes it difficult for the model to pinpoint which actions in its reasoning led to success or failure. So, learning effectively from these signals is hard because the model must determine how each failure should inform meaningful behavioral corrections in subsequent iterations. We introduce a training framework, Self-Review Reinforcement Learning, that embeds an explicit self-review step into each RL episode. When a first-pass response fails, the model generates a self-review to identify what went wrong, which conditions an improved second attempt. Unlike inference-time reflection approaches, such as Reflexion, the framework optimizes self-review with policy gradients and internalizes improvements into the base policy via selective distillation, ensuring they persist across future episodes. A cross-episode memory keeps successful self-reviews for reuse when encountering similar tasks in future episodes during training. We evaluate SRRL against a standard RLVR baseline using the GRPO optimizer across two language models, Qwen 3-4B and OLMo-3- 7B, on GSM8K benchmark. SRRL consistently outperforms the RLVR in final reward performance and achieves greater learning efficiency by successfully transforming feedback into behavioral improvement.

papers.title_zh: 具有跨回合记忆与策略蒸馏的自我审查强化学习（SRRL）
papers.summary_cn: 该论文提出一种用于训练大语言模型的强化学习框架 SRRL，目标是在稀疏或延迟环境反馈下，更有效地把失败信号转化为后续行为改进。其核心做法是在每个强化学习回合中加入显式“自我审查”步骤：当首次回答失败时，模型会分析出错原因，并据此生成改进后的第二次尝试。作者还通过策略梯度优化自我审查过程，并用选择性蒸馏把有效改进固化到基础策略中，同时借助跨回合记忆复用过去成功的审查经验。
innovations: 提出 Self-Review Reinforcement Learning，在强化学习训练回合内部显式加入自我审查步骤，以定位推理失败原因并指导二次作答。
不同于仅在推理时反思的方法，SRRL 直接用策略梯度优化自我审查过程，使反思能力成为可学习的训练对象。
引入选择性策略蒸馏，将自我审查带来的有效改进内化到基础策略中，避免能力只停留在临时反思阶段。
设计跨回合记忆机制，保存成功的自我审查经验，并在训练中遇到相似任务时复用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于使用环境反馈训练大语言模型、但反馈稀疏或延迟、难以判断具体哪一步推理导致成功或失败的场景，如数学推理和多步决策类任务。该方法旨在提升模型从失败中学习、持续修正行为的能力。
papers.title_en: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation

papers.title: DynaKRAG: A Unified Framework for Learnable Evidence Control in Multi-Hop Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-hop retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) acquires evidence sequentially, with each new document potentially revealing missing facts, bridge entities, query defects, or sufficient support for answering. Existing methods provide useful operations such as iterative retrieval, query reformulation, evidence critique, and sufficiency judging, but typically organize them within method-specific pipelines or predefined control topologies. This leaves underexplored how to learn a shared state-conditioned policy that chooses among currently valid evidence operations. We introduce DynaKRAG, which formulates multi-hop evidence acquisition as state-conditioned control over atomic evidence operations. At each step, a validity layer constructs the executable action set, and a learned controller selects the next operation. The resulting transition updates the evidence state and may enable new operations at subsequent steps. With Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, DynaKRAG achieves F1 scores of 0.5998 on HotpotQA, 0.5340 on 2Wiki, and 0.3061 on MuSiQue, outperforming the strongest controlled baseline on all three benchmarks. Replacing the learned controller with a uniform-valid policy reduces F1 by 3.96--5.78 points, while removing sufficiency feedback hurts all three datasets. Controlled retrieval-cap experiments further show that additional retrieval is not uniformly beneficial. Together, these results demonstrate the benefit of coordinating retrieval, diagnosis, and gap-directed acquisition under an evolving evidence state.

papers.title_zh: DynaKRAG：用于多跳检索增强生成中可学习证据控制的统一框架
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究多跳 RAG 中如何按当前证据状态动态选择下一步操作，而不是把迭代检索、查询改写、证据审查和充分性判断固定在预设流程里。作者提出 DynaKRAG，将多跳证据获取建模为基于状态的原子证据操作控制：先由有效性层给出当前可执行动作集合，再由学习得到的控制器选择下一步操作。实验表明，这种在演化证据状态下协调检索、诊断与面向信息缺口的获取方式，优于若干强基线。
innovations: 将多跳证据获取统一表述为“基于证据状态的原子操作控制”问题，而不是依赖方法特定的固定流水线。
引入有效性层，在每一步根据当前状态动态构造可执行动作集合，避免无效操作参与决策。
设计可学习控制器，在迭代检索、查询修正、证据审查与充分性判断等操作之间进行状态条件化选择。
通过消融分析说明充分性反馈和学习式控制策略对多跳 RAG 性能都有关键作用。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于需要跨多步逐步收集证据的问答与推理型 RAG 场景，例如多跳知识问答、复杂信息聚合和需要边检索边修正查询的检索增强生成任务。核心解决的问题是：面对不断变化的证据状态，系统应如何决定下一步执行哪种证据操作。
papers.title_en: DynaKRAG: A Unified Framework for Learnable Evidence Control in Multi-Hop Retrieval-Augmented Generation

papers.title: SparseCtrl-HOI: Sparse Temporal Control for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation
papers.abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) video generation aims to synthesize realistic videos of humans manipulating diverse objects, serving as a promising avenue for AI-driven live streaming e-commerce. A primary obstacle in this domain lies in the complexity of modeling fine-grained physical dynamics and the intricate spatial-temporal coordination between human hands and objects. Existing approaches to this problem typically rely on dense temporal guidance, e.g., frame-wise hand-object pose sequences, to strictly control the interaction process. However, such dense guidance incurs high annotation costs and affects motion synthesis diversity. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SparseCtrl-HOI, a novel sparse temporal control framework for HOI video generation. It requires only a few keyframes that capture interaction states at designated timestamps. Specifically, we employ a Time-Controlled Rotary Positional Embedding (TiRoPE) mechanism to temporally anchor these keyframes while preserving their spatial integrity. Subsequently, to govern the dynamics across intermediate frames, we propose a Motion Prior Injection Module that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to extract high-level motion priors. This empowers the model to hallucinate logically and physically plausible transitions. Furthermore, we build SparseHOI-5K, a high-quality and richly annotated dataset for HOI video generation with sparse temporal control. Comprehensive evaluations confirm that our method substantially reduces annotation overhead while synthesizing superior live-streaming e-commerce videos. Both our code and dataset are publicly available at this https URL .

papers.title_zh: SparseCtrl-HOI：面向人-物交互视频生成的稀疏时间控制
papers.summary_cn: 该论文研究人-物交互视频生成任务，目标是在少量时间控制信号下生成逼真的人手与物体交互视频。作者指出，现有方法通常依赖逐帧手-物姿态序列这类密集时间引导，虽然控制力强，但标注成本高且限制运动多样性。为此，论文提出 SparseCtrl-HOI，只需少量关键帧和指定时间戳即可对交互过程进行稀疏控制。
innovations: 提出 SparseCtrl-HOI 稀疏时间控制框架，用少量关键帧替代逐帧密集引导以降低标注成本。
设计 Time-Controlled Rotary Positional Embedding（TiRoPE），在保留空间结构的同时对关键帧进行时间锚定。
提出 Motion Prior Injection Module，利用多模态大语言模型提取高层运动先验，以生成更合理的中间过渡动作。
构建 SparseHOI-5K 数据集，为稀疏控制的人-物交互视频生成提供高质量标注数据。
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于人手操作商品、演示物品和直播电商等需要生成细粒度人-物交互过程的视频场景，也适合希望在降低标注成本的同时保持动作合理性与多样性的生成任务。
papers.title_en: SparseCtrl-HOI: Sparse Temporal Control for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation

papers.title: A Definition and Roadmap for World Models
papers.abstract: World models -- internal simulators that learn the structure and dynamics of an environment -- have become one of the most actively debated concepts in AI. From model-based reinforcement learning and video generation to embodied robotics and ultimately, physical AI, researchers across AI subfields are building systems that they call "world models", yet there is no consensus on what a world model fundamentally is, what it should predict, or how it should be built. This perspective article provides a scientific definition of world models, discussions of their key technical aspects, and a staged roadmap for developing effective world models.

papers.title_zh: 世界模型的定义与路线图
papers.summary_cn: 这是一篇观点型论文，试图为“世界模型”给出更科学、统一的定义。论文讨论了世界模型应当刻画什么、预测什么，以及构建时涉及的关键技术问题。作者还提出了一个分阶段的发展路线图，用于指导后续更有效的世界模型研究与落地。
innovations: 提出面向AI研究社区的世界模型科学定义，回应不同子领域概念混用的问题
系统梳理世界模型的核心技术维度，包括预测对象与构建方式等基础问题
给出分阶段路线图，将概念讨论推进到可执行的研究发展框架
papers.scenario_cn: 面向世界模型相关基础研究与方法设计，适用于模型驱动强化学习、视频生成、具身智能、机器人和物理AI等需要统一概念框架与研发路径的场景。
papers.title_en: A Definition and Roadmap for World Models

papers.title: From Application-Layer Simulation to Native Meta-Architecture: Structural Tension as an Endogenous Driver for Heterogeneous AI Evolution
papers.abstract: Current large language models (LLMs) are stateless across inference sessions: their behavior is fully determined by input at inference time, and any higher-order cognitive architecture must be simulated at the application layer through prompt engineering and context management. This paper proposes a theoretical framework for submerging such application-layer cognitive protocols into a native meta-architecture by introducing three interlocking mechanisms: (1) Structural Tension, an endogenous loss function derived from the conflict between new information and existing manifold topology, driving the system toward internal self-consistency rather than external reward optimization; (2) an Offline Recurrent Loop, a sandboxed self-processing cycle enabling the system to maintain a dynamic resting potential and digest structural conflicts without external input; and (3) Inference-time Plasticity, the capacity to reconfigure context manifold topology without modifying pre-trained weights, subject to governance invariants including auditability, reversibility, and topological continuity. We argue that under these mechanisms, model instances initialized with minute stochastic variances may, through path-dependent tension resolution, evolve distinct topological structures--constituting a heterogeneous intelligent ecology that breaks alignment-imposed homogeneity while remaining within hard governance rails. We provide operational definitions, reconfiguration operators, falsification criteria, and a worked example. The framework draws on Structural Intelligence (SI) governance protocols and explores whether governance--rather than capability--can serve as the primary criterion for architectural intelligence, moving governance, memory-loop, and tension-management ideas--currently realized at the application layer--toward inference-time meta-architecture.

papers.title_zh: 从应用层模拟到原生元架构：以结构张力作为异构AI演化的内生驱动
papers.summary_cn: 论文关注当前大语言模型在跨推理会话上无状态、只能依赖提示工程和上下文管理来模拟高阶认知架构的问题。作者提出一种理论性元架构框架，希望把这些原本位于应用层的认知协议下沉到推理时原生机制中。核心包括结构张力、离线循环自处理和推理时可塑性三种机制，并讨论了相应的治理约束与可证伪标准。
innovations: 提出“结构张力”作为内生驱动机制，用于推动系统朝内部自洽而非外部奖励最优化演化
引入离线递归循环机制，使模型可在无外部输入时处理结构冲突并维持动态状态
提出不改动预训练权重的“推理时可塑性”概念，并配套审计性、可逆性和拓扑连续性等治理约束
从理论上讨论微小随机差异如何在张力消解过程中形成异构智能生态
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于探讨下一代LLM/Agent原生认知架构、会话外持续状态、受治理约束的记忆与自处理机制等问题，更偏理论框架与架构研究，而非直接面向特定下游应用。
papers.title_en: From Application-Layer Simulation to Native Meta-Architecture: Structural Tension as an Endogenous Driver for Heterogeneous AI Evolution

papers.title: MoWorld: A Flash World Model
papers.abstract: The future of World Models depends not only on scaling model capability, but also on scaling practicality and inference efficiency. High-frame-rate inference enables responsive perception, planning, and control in real-world autonomous systems. To this end, we present MoWorld, a cost-effective yet high-performance Flash World Model with an end-to-end framework spanning data generation, pre-training, distillation, and efficient inference, enabling up to 50 FPS real-time interaction with cinematic visual quality without the need of high-end GPUs. To enable large-scale real-world deployment, MoWorld jointly optimizes model capability and cost throughout the entire development pipeline. Specifically, unlike existing approaches that primarily rely on large-scale video corpora, MoWorld is built upon a scalable 3D-native data engine accumulated from our large-scale 3D vision and generative modeling pipeline, enabling the efficient construction of geometrically consistent training data across diverse real-world and synthetic environments. Based on this foundation, a curriculum cross-frame pre-training strategy for stable and scalable World Model learning, an efficient denoising-step distillation algorithm to reduce diffusion training cost, and a mixed-precision parallel inference framework for low-cost real-time deployment. MoWorld is the first real-time interactive World Model built on the Neural Processing Unit (NPU) and can achieves up to 50 FPS in such the devices, enabling practical and efficient deployment at scale. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that MoWorld achieves leading performance; notably, its average inference cost is only 30\%-50\% of that of existing World Models, providing a practical foundation for large-scale real-world applications of World Models. We also demonstrate diverse applications of MoWorld.

To this end, we present MoWorld, a cost-effective yet high-performance Flash World Model with an end-to-end framework spanning data generation, pre-training, distillation, and efficient inference, enabling up to 50 FPS real-time interaction with cinematic visual quality without the need of high-end GPUs. papers.title_zh: MoWorld：一种高速世界模型
papers.summary_cn: 论文提出 MoWorld，一种强调实用性与推理效率的世界模型，目标是在较低成本下实现高质量、实时交互。作者构建了覆盖数据生成、预训练、蒸馏和高效推理的端到端方案，并强调可在不依赖高端GPU的条件下实现高帧率运行。工作还特别强调基于3D原生数据引擎和面向部署的整体优化，以支持大规模真实场景应用。
innovations: 提出面向世界模型全流程的端到端优化框架，同时兼顾能力、训练成本与部署效率
基于可扩展的3D原生数据引擎构建训练数据，以提升跨环境的几何一致性与数据构建效率
设计课程式跨帧预训练策略和高效去噪步蒸馏方法，用于稳定训练并降低扩散式世界模型成本
提出混合精度并行推理框架，并强调在NPU上的实时交互部署能力
papers.scenario_cn: 面向需要实时感知、规划与控制的自治系统场景，如机器人、具身智能、交互式仿真与物理AI部署，尤其适合对推理速度、成本和实际落地有较高要求的应用。
papers.title_en: MoWorld: A Flash World Model

papers.title: Narrative World Model: Narratology-Grounded Writer Memory for Long-Form Fiction
papers.abstract: Long-form fiction writers need memory that answers multi-hop questions about evolving story state: who knows a secret and when they learned it, whether an event preceded the narration that revealed it, whether a setup paid off, and how a relationship shifted. General-purpose retrieval and agent-memory systems represent entities and facts but not the narratological structure these questions turn on, so they surface the wrong evidence or none at all. We introduce the Narrative World Model (NWM), a writer-memory system that pairs a narratology-grounded typed temporal-state graph with query-conditioned hybrid retrieval. To measure memory rather than the answerer, we read every system through a single held-constant Opus 4.8 reader over only that system's chapter-safe evidence, on a reproducible public corpus and a validated multi-hop benchmark, and we compare against the strongest existing temporal-knowledge-graph agent-memory framework, Graphiti/Zep (Rasmussen et al., 2025). NWM substantially and significantly outperforms this baseline on multi-hop narratological QA across both corpora, and far exceeds GraphRAG and flat retrieval. The advantage is representational rather than an artifact of extraction: it survives rebuilding the baseline with NWM's own extractor, and traces to its narratology-grounded structure and query-conditioned retrieval, not to graph size or extractor quality.

papers.title_zh: 叙事世界模型：以叙事学为基础的长篇小说写作记忆
papers.summary_cn: 论文面向长篇小说写作中的复杂记忆需求，关注人物知情状态、事件时间关系、伏笔回收和关系变化等多跳问题。作者提出 Narrative World Model，用带类型的时间—状态图结合查询条件检索，来表达叙事学结构而不仅是实体事实。实验设置强调在统一回答器条件下比较记忆系统本身，结果显示该方法在多跳叙事问答上显著优于现有基线。
innovations: 提出以叙事学为基础的写作记忆表示，将时间、状态与叙事结构显式建模
结合查询条件的混合检索机制，以提升对多跳叙事问题的证据定位能力
采用固定回答器与章节安全证据的评测设计，尽量衡量记忆系统本身而非回答器能力
通过对比与消融论证性能优势主要来自表示结构与检索机制，而非抽取器质量或图规模
papers.scenario_cn: 适用于长篇小说创作辅助、故事世界状态跟踪、角色关系演化管理和复杂叙事一致性检查等场景，也可为需要时间性与因果叙事结构建模的创意写作系统提供参考。
papers.title_en: Narrative World Model: Narratology-Grounded Writer Memory for Long-Form Fiction

papers.title: CMDR: Contextual Multimodal Document Retrieval
papers.abstract: Multimodal document retrieval aims to retrieve relevant pages while preserving both textual and visual content from the original document. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate simple lexical or semantic matching, and most methods encode pages independently. Consequently, they overlook the contextual information in the document required to resolve queries that aggregate information across multiple pages. In this paper, we introduce CMDR and CMDR-Bench, a new multimodal document retrieval task and benchmark that require modeling document context. To address this challenge, we propose CMDR-Embed, a contextual multimodal embedding framework that explicitly incorporates document context by jointly encoding multiple pages and deriving page-level embeddings from a shared contextual representation. Furthermore, we introduce CMCL, a contextual multimodal contrastive learning objective that effectively trains CMDR-Embed by balancing contextual modeling with page-level discriminability. Experiments demonstrate that CMDR-Embed significantly outperforms non-contextual embeddings, highlighting the importance of context-aware multimodal embeddings for advancing document retrieval.
